brief_notes: Solid nanopore metagenomics benchmarking paper comparing 5 classifiers across R9 and R10 chemistries. The R9-to-R10 chemistry transition analysis is the novel contribution and findings are clearly presented. Weaknesses: only 5 tools evaluated (fewer than competing benchmarks), mock community details are vague ('several well-characterized' without naming them), no statistical tests on F1 differences, limited references (~10), no confidence intervals, methods lack specifics on mock community composition and number of replicates. The discussion of why Centrifuge declines with R10 is speculative. Scope is narrower than the companion metagenomics benchmark paper.
